annotation_target.structure: Final approach consequent — approaching final E minor chord
teaching_goals: the prelude is completing — the long chromatic journey arrives at its destination
E minor at the end is not a triumph — it is an acceptance
style_tips: no accent on the final chord — it should arrive quietly

teaching_notes.note: The final phrase — the E minor arrives as inevitably as the sea finding the shore.
technique: quiet, slow, final — no ritardando unless marked

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 45–48 of Prelude in E Minor, Op. 28 No. 4 (continuation of mm. 41–44), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 45–48 and describe the closing phrase.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 45–48.
Measures 45–48 bring the prelude toward its final E minor chord. The piece has spent its entire length descending into this profound quietude. Let me loop mm. 45–48.
Chopin Prelude E minor mm. 45–48: approaching final E minor, profound quietude. Pairs with mm. 41–44.
